title: Narcissism, Machiavellianism, and the people who lean hardest on AI
summary: Kırcaburun modelled two constructs as serial pathways between personality and problematic use. Among the women, the association between narcissism and problematic use ran entirely through vertical individualism; among the men, individualism and intolerance of uncertainty carried it in part.
